title: String formatting should not lead to runtime errors
description: Avoid using string formatting methods that can raise exceptions. Use f-strings or the str.format() method with format specifiers instead.
message: String formatting operation may raise runtime errors
impact: It may cause the application to fail or behave unpredictably
why_is_this_an_issue: String formatting operations that can raise exceptions can cause the application to fail or behave unpredictably
how_to_fix: Use safer string formatting methods like f-strings or the str.format() method with format specifiers
function_code:
def check_string_formatting(node):
    return any(ast.Store(value) for value in node.value.args.values() if value.value is None and 'fmt' in value.args and not value.args.get('fmt', {}).get('format_spec'))

metadata.title: String formatting should not lead to runtime errors
